steps.title: Find the stated limitation
steps.content: The passage directly identifies the method's limit: Google Places API data tend to cover customer-facing places. That means some neighborhood amenities may be left out of the data.

steps.title: Reject unstated drawbacks
steps.content: A says the data are outdated, but the text does not mention age. B refers to advances from other fields, which the text never discusses. D concerns neighborhood boundaries, not incomplete amenity data. The answer is C.
